returns.orderIds: The bytes32 IDs of the newly created orders
returns.orderKeys: The corresponding order keys for each order

batchSyncAndClaimTokens(((address,addres.details: For each set of parameters, this function calls sync and then claims the owed tokens.

returns.tokensClaimed: An array with the amount of tokens claimed

params.orderKey: The OrderKey identifying the order to cancel

returns.buyTokensOut: The amount of buy tokens earned before cancellation
returns.sellTokensRefund: The amount of sell tokens refunded

params.currencies: An array of currency addresses for which the caller wants to claim tokens.

returns.tokensClaimed: An array containing the total amount of tokens claimed for each corresponding currency.

params.key: The PoolKey for which to identify the AMM pool of the order
The pool key associated with the TWAMM
The pool key associated with the TWAMM.
params.targetTimestamp: The timestamp until which to process outstanding TWAMM orders (must be >= lastVirtualOrderTimestamp and <= block.timestamp).

getOrder((address,address,uint24,int24,a.details: Provides the entire Order struct associated with the given orderKey in the pool identified by poolKey.

params.orderKey: The OrderKey for which to identify the order
params.poolKey: The PoolKey that identifies the relevant pool

returns.order: Information associated with a long term order

getOrderPool((address,address,uint24,int.details: Depending on zeroForOne, returns the state for the pool that sells token0 for token1 or vice versa.

params.key: The PoolKey that identifies the relevant pool
params.zeroForOne: True for the token0->token1 order pool; False for the token1->token0 order pool

returns.earningsFactorCurrent: The current factor used to calculate how many tokens each order is owed
returns.sellRateCurrent: The current cumulative sell rate (amount of tokens sold per interval)

params.next: The new length of the oracle array, independent of population

returns.cardinalityNext: The new length of the oracle array

lastVirtualOrderTimestamp(bytes32).details: This returns the timestamp representing the last time the TWAMM executed orders for the specified pool.

params.key: The PoolId that identifies the pool

returns.timestamp: The timestamp of the last TWAMM order execution for the given pool

params.secondsAgos: Each amount of time to look back, in seconds, at which point to return an observation

returns.tickCumulatives: The tick * time elapsed since the pool was first initialized, as of each `secondsAgo`

returns.orderId: The bytes32 ID of the order

syncAndClaimTokens(((address,address,uin.details: For each set of parameters, this function calls sync and then claims the owed tokens.

returns.tokens0Claimed: An array with the amount of token0 claimed for each order
returns.tokens1Claimed: An array with the amount of token1 claimed for each order

batchSubmitOrders(((address,address,uint.notice: Submits multiple new long term orders into the TWAMM. Also executes TWAMM orders if not up to date.

batchSyncAndClaimTokens(((address,addres.notice: Allowing sync multiple orders and then claims the owed tokens.

claimTokensByCurrencies(address[]).notice: Claims tokens owed from the TWAMM contract in a batch for multiple currencies.

claimTokensByPoolKey((address,address,ui.notice: Claim tokens owed from TWAMM contract

executeTWAMMOrders((address,address,uint.notice: Executes TWAMM orders on the pool, swapping on the pool itself to make up the difference between the two TWAMM pools swapping against each other
Executes all outstanding TWAMM orders on the specified pool, up to the target timestamp.

getOrder((address,address,uint24,int24,a.notice: Retrieves a specific order from the TWAMM for the given pool.

getOrderPool((address,address,uint24,int.notice: Returns the current sell rate and earnings factor for the chosen order pool.

increaseCardinality(bytes32,uint16).notice: Increases the cardinality of the oracle array

lastVirtualOrderTimestamp(bytes32).notice: Returns the last virtual order execution timestamp for a given pool

observe(bytes32,uint32[]).notice: Returns the accumulator values as of each time seconds ago from the given time in the array of `secondsAgos`

submitOrder(((address,address,uint24,int.notice: Submits a new long term order into the TWAMM. Also executes TWAMM orders if not up to date.

sync(((address,address,uint24,int24,addr.notice: Syncs the current pool and order state

syncAndClaimTokens(((address,address,uin.notice: Allowing sync order and then claims the owed tokens.
